title: DIMCP EP_11 season1
archivePath: CRFW Archive/_Documentation/Videos/2018/Dog is my Copilot/DIMCP EP_11 season1.mp4
transcript:
[00:00:00.00] What's up? This is another episode of Doggies, my co-pilot.
[00:00:05.00] What up? We've got these tacos.
[00:00:11.00] Someone got...
[00:00:13.00] Sorry, my dog's thirsty right here.
[00:00:16.00] See how I'm gonna drink your dog.
[00:00:19.00] What up? This guy got some tacos.
[00:00:22.00] Who got these tacos? We got these tacos from a place called Los Tacos.
[00:00:25.00] They have some blind tracks on deck on the sound system.
[00:00:29.00] Yeah. There's like an aggro guy running in a place who likes to just yell out when the orders aren't even though I'm the only one waiting.
[00:00:38.00] He just had to yell it out.
[00:00:41.00] He looked like some guy who had been saying for years my dream is own in my own taco place.
[00:00:48.00] He was like Italian. It's pretty weird.
[00:00:51.00] Anyways, we're taking these tacos to someone named Jeffrey T.
[00:00:56.00] Who is allegedly...
